findings.description: Tables A1 and A2 are duplicated in the HTML output. Each table appears twice: first in a compact/small inline format and then again in a full-width expanded HTML table format. A reader scrolling through the HTML would encounter all of Table A1 data (K1-K62, ENVRTO, ENVRCO) and Table A2 data twice in sequence, which does not occur in the PDF.
findings.evidence: In the HTML, after the 'cc: Tom Anderson' line, compact renderings of Table A1 (K1-K62 + ENVRTO/ENVRCO) and Table A2 (K1-K62 + ENVRTO/ENVRCO) appear first. Then the same tables are rendered again in expanded, full-width HTML table format with the same headers ('Table A1. Modeled Release Parameters for Point Sources' and 'Table A2. 1-hour SO2 and NO2 Modeled Emission Rates'). The PDF contains each table only once.
